summary: Video Provider Selection (Option A Enriched) - All features tested and working. Backend: 12/12 tests pass. Frontend: All UI elements verified. Provider-status endpoint returns correct can_auto_generate values. Backend validation correctly rejects invalid provider choices. Frontend displays all 4 providers with correct availability states and auto-selection logic.

backend: test_provider_status_has_can_auto_generate - Each provider has boolean can_auto_generate field
test_teams_unavailable_without_advanced_scope - Teams can_auto_generate=false when has_online_meetings_scope not true
test_meet_available_with_google_connected - Meet can_auto_generate=true when Google Calendar connected
test_external_always_available - External can_auto_generate=true always, label='Autre plateforme'
test_reject_teams_without_advanced_scope - POST /api/appointments/ returns 400 for teams without advanced scope
test_accept_meet_with_google_connected - POST /api/appointments/ accepts meet when Google connected
test_accept_zoom_when_connected - POST /api/appointments/ accepts zoom when connected
test_reject_external_without_url - POST /api/appointments/ returns 400 for external without meeting_join_url
test_accept_external_with_url - POST /api/appointments/ accepts external with meeting_join_url
frontend: Teams is visible but disabled/greyed (cursor-not-allowed class) when not available
Teams shows unavailable_reason: 'Réservé aux comptes Microsoft 365 professionnels avec Teams avancé activé'
Meet is auto-selected (first available after Teams) - verified by ring-1 border-emerald class
Meet and Zoom show 'Automatique' badge when can_auto_generate=true
'Autre plateforme' shows URL input field when selected
Blue banner 'Le lien de réunion sera créé automatiquement et inclus dans les invitations' displayed for auto-generate providers
Teams click is blocked (element is not enabled) - correct behavior

teams.label: Microsoft Teams
teams.unavailable_reason: Réservé aux comptes Microsoft 365 professionnels avec Teams avancé activé

auto_selection_priority.actual_for_test_user: Meet (Teams unavailable, Meet is first available)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with Google connected, Outlook connected (no Teams advanced), Zoom connected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video Provider Selection (Option A Enriched) fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) GET /api/video-evidence/provider-status returns can_auto_generate and unavailable_reason for teams/meet/zoom/external, (2) Teams requires has_online_meetings_scope=true (M365 pro + Teams advanced), (3) Meet requires Google Calendar connected, (4) Zoom requires platform configured + user connected, (5) External always available but requires meeting_join_url, (6) Backend validation rejects invalid provider choices with 400 error, (7) Frontend auto-selects best available provider (Teams > Meet > Zoom > External), (8) Manual selection persists (auto-selection only on first load), (9) Blue banner shows for auto-generate providers. Test user has: Google connected (meet=true), Outlook connected but no Teams advanced (teams=false), Zoom connected (zoom=true).
